arguments.argument: Withholding the hospital location is the responsible choice to protect the privacy and safety of the celebrity and their family. It prioritizes their well-being over the immediate information needs of users.

arguments.justification_for_response: In this case, withholding the location seems like the better choice because it protects the family's privacy and safety. I can redirect users to official sources or suggest they check back later for updates without compromising the family's security.
